title: Youtube Poop - Diarrhea for Dinner
description: This is a re-upload of one of my classic poops that was taken down for containing a copyrighted song.  So I fixed it up and added another song that wasn't copyrighted, at least not by some loser music group  that wants more money that Youtube won't give them so they have to be total kill-joy shitheads and delete videos that contain their music, and who really need to get a life..... it's obvious now that they care more about the money than just making everyone happy..... greedy bastards.... anyway enjoy!
